name: Mornay Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a heavy saucepan.
2. Saute parsley and scallions for one minute.
3. Blend in flour and cook, stirring constantly for one minute.
4. Blend in cream and bring to boiling.
5. Add cheeses and stir until melted.
6. Add vermouth and season with salt and cayenne to taste.
